character.definition: (corrupted form) to follow, to trust to; to put confidence in; to depend on, to turn around; to turn the body, (interchangeable 隱)
by means of; thereby, therefore; in order to
preserved and dried meat, (a dialect) fried; cooked small pieces of meat, meat broth
(same as standard form 噇) to eat, to eat heavily; to eat without limits
(same as 鱦) small fish, spawn, or roe, frog group
(archaic) a tree whose bark can be used in pickling; (Cant.) olive
